parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { campaign_id: 'tg-outreach', lead_id: $json.lead_id, destination: { telegram_user_id: $json.telegram_chat_id || '', username: $json.telegram_username || '' }, text: $json.outbound_text, idempotency_key: $json.idempotency_key, metadata: { sequence_step: Number($json.followup_count || 0), message_type: $json.is_followup ? 'follow_up' : 'first_touch', campaign_type: 'outreach' } } }}

={{ { chat_id: $env.OPS_CHAT_ID, text: $json.ops_message, disable_web_page_preview: true, reply_markup: { inline_keyboard: [ [ { text: 'APPROVE', callback_data: $json.cb_approve }, { text: 'EDIT', callback_data: $json.cb_edit } ], [ { text: 'SKIP', callback_data: $json.cb_skip }, { text: 'DNC', callback_data: $json.cb_dnc } ] ] } } }}
